introSection: Original Wild Mouse was a self-built wooden wild mouse roller coaster that was previously located at Boblo Island in Amherstburg, Ontario, Canada.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Original Wild Mouse opened at Boblo Island in 1957. When it originally opened, the ride's track was entirely wooden. Over time, the wooden track was replaced with steel.

The ride eventually closed at an unknown time between 1974 and 1993.

fullText:
Original Wild Mouse was a self-built wooden wild mouse roller coaster that was previously located at Boblo Island in Amherstburg, Ontario, Canada.

Original Wild Mouse opened at Boblo Island in 1957. When it originally opened, the ride's track was entirely wooden. Over time, the wooden track was replaced with steel.

The ride eventually closed at an unknown time between 1974 and 1993.

White track and supports.
